The '''Utapau Security Forces''' were the [[Planetary Security Forces]] for the Planet of [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]].

==Description==
The Utapauan Security Force (USF) was the primary military organization on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]], a planet composed of independent city-states.<ref name="SEWE:TP">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sagaenhancementpauans|text=Saga Edition Web Enhancement: The Pau'ans}}</ref><ref name="FF1417" /> The USF was the only part of the government that remained active at all times, getting involved with visitors only when they posed a threat to the entire planet.<ref name="SEWE:TP" /> All ranks of the USF were drawn from the [[Pau'an/Legends|Pau’an]],<ref name="FF1417" /> a native [[Species/Legends|species]] of Utapau that represented the public face of the planet,<ref name="Databank">{{DB|species|utapaun|Utapaun}}</ref> while the [[Utai/Legends|Utai]],<ref name="FF1417" /> another native species that comprised Utapau's working class,<ref name="Databank" /> carried out the armed forces’ more menial and technical roles. The USF standardized the training and equipment of Utapau’s warriors, forming an effective fighting force. The USF maintained spacious stables for its cavalry, housing [[Dactillion/Legends|Dactillions]] and [[Varactyl/Legends|Varactyls]] in specialized stalls and storing armaments in dedicated racks and storerooms. Massed formations could deliver coordinated fire from behind shield walls, supported by snipers armed with blaster rifles such as the [[HB-9 rifle|Zenoti Arms HB-9]], with most of the USF’s equipment supplied by [[Zenoti Arms/Legends|Zenoti Arms]].<ref name="FF1417" /> 

Utapauan warriors wore blood-red, multi-layered garments of heavy cloth reinforced with armor plates, which were originally made of bone but were later replaced with blaster-resistant metals. They carried traditional shields with two-pronged cutaways at the bottom that could lock together to form shield walls. The standard weapon of the USF was the [[Utapaun bident/Legends|Utapaun bident]], which combined a double [[Vibroblade/Legends|Vibroblade]] for close combat with a blaster for ranged attacks.<ref name="FF1417" />

==History==
During the Clone Wars, the USF defeated [[Grievous/Legends|General Grievous’]] droid army in [[Pau City/Legends|Pau City]].<ref name="FF1417">{{FactFile2014|17|UTA 1-2|Utapaun Warrior Equipment}}</ref> When the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy]] invaded Utapau, the homemade USF [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] were destroyed<ref name="SEWE:TP" />, and the [[Utapau Skyforce/Legends|Utapau Skyforce]] was forced into hiding in Utapau’s natural caverns or in deep space.<ref name="ROTS:ICS">''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections]]''</ref> During the subsequent [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Battle of Utapau]], the security force, led by [[Senin Vant/Legends|Senin Vant]], resurfaced and deployed [[Porax-38 starfighter|P-38 starfighters]] and dactillions against the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] [[Mankvim-814 light interceptor/Legends|Mankvim-814 light interceptors]].<ref name="ROTS:ICS" /> Following the battle, however, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] fully occupied the planet, and the USF’s remaining stock of weapons, armor, and equipment was confiscated and destroyed.<ref name="FF1417" />

==Behind the scenes==
Members of the USF were computer-generated and carefully matched to the texture and look of the practical performers.<ref name="Chronicles">[[Star Wars Chronicles: The Prequels]]</ref> the Utapau Security Forces were designed by [[Aaron McBride]] during the production for [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].<ref name="AB">{{Tumblr|subdomain=starwars|url=post/128434537408/artist-of-the-week-aaron-mcbride|name=Star Wars|text=Artist of the Week - Aaron McBride|date=2015-09-15}}</ref>
